# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyVPC
  Subnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref 'VPC'
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/24'
      AvailabilityZone: 'us-west-2a'
  Subnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref 'VPC'
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      AvailabilityZone: 'us-west-2b'
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyVPC-IGW
  VpcGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref 'InternetGateway'
      VpcId: !Ref 'VPC'
  NATGateway1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NATGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt Subnet1.NatGatewayAddresses[0].AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref 'Subnet1'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyVPC-NAT-GW-AZ-a
  NATGateway2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NATGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt Subnet2.NatGatewayAddresses[0].AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref 'Subnet2'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyVPC-NAT-GW-AZ-b
  RouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref 'VPC'
      Routes:
        - DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
          GatewayId: !GetAtt InternetGateway.InternetGatewayId
  RouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref 'VPC'
      Routes:
        - DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
          GatewayId: !GetAtt NATGateway1.NatGatewayId
  SubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref 'RouteTable1'
      SubnetId: !Ref 'Subnet1'
  SubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref 'RouteTable2'
      SubnetId: !Ref 'Subnet2'
